strategic_objective: Explore the coexistence of near-constant and highly variable features to characterize dataset heterogeneity and measurement effects.
key_checks: Measure cardinality and distribution shifts for low cardinality bulk and flag features
Evaluate class-conditioned structural variation in features with strong distributional shifts
Investigate if low cardinality features reflect saturation or measurement limits
Assess how models might reconcile or leverage heterogeneous feature behaviors
success_criteria: Evidence clarifying whether low cardinality features obscure meaningful variation
Understanding of how heterogeneous feature types influence model interpretability and stability
Identification of potential feature groups requiring distinct handling strategies
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for low cardinality and variable features
preserve evidence references e8 to e12 and e23 to e33
